author: phase-4-coordinator
content: NpElement now implements bool — turns out numpy::Element already did, so the exclusion was arbitrary. Added bool to the impl_np_element! macro invocation and added 1D and 2D bool roundtrip tests (Array1<bool> ↔ PyArray1<bool>, Array2<bool> ↔ PyArray2<bool>). 12 python-feature tests pass including the two new bool ones.
